topics.title: Venice Film Festival Announces Star-Studded Lineup Featuring Pattinson, Cruz, and Oasis Doc
topics.angle: Venice Film Festival unveils its star-studded competition lineup featuring new films from acclaimed directors and a documentary on the Oasis reunion tour.

sources.headline: Robert Pattinson, Penélope Cruz, Alicia Vikander and Oasis Lead All-Star Venice Lineup
sources.summary: New films from Martin McDonagh, Florian Zeller, Werner Herzog, and Danny Boyle are among the competition stand outs, with non-fiction highlights including a film on the Oasis reunion tour and Alex Gibney's much-delayed Elon Musk doc.

topics.title: Netflix Reteams With Yeon Sang-ho for 'Parasyte: Tamiya' Series
topics.angle: Netflix is reteaming with director Yeon Sang-ho for a new series, 'Parasyte: Tamiya', starring Shioli Kutsuna.

sources.headline: Netflix Reteams With Yeon Sang-ho for Parasyte: Tamiya Series
sources.summary: The 'Parasyte: The Grey' follow-up will star Japanese actress Shioli Kutsuna as the original manga's fan-favorite parasite Ryoko Tamiya — a human, a monster and something in between.

sources.headline: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to Parasyte Universe With Tamiya, Starring Shioli Kutsuna, at Netflix
sources.summary: Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the Parasyte universe with Parasyte: Tamiya, a new live-action series starring Shioli Kutsuna for Netflix, set to stream in 2027. The series marks another collaboration between Netflix and Yeon ( Hellbound, Parasyte: The Grey ), who developed Parasyte: Tamiya and co-wrote the script with Ryu Yong-jae. sources.headline: Brave New Love Dives Into Lust, Infidelity, Norms, Motherhood and Shame (Exclusive Clip)
sources.summary: Kathrine Thorborg Johansen and Anders Danielsen Lie feature in writer-director Maria Bäck's film about a woman caught up in the chaos of societal expectations and bodily fluids that debuts at Locarno.

topics.title: Black Eyed Peas' 'My Humps' Hits 1 Billion YouTube Views
topics.angle: The Black Eyed Peas' iconic 2005 hit 'My Humps' has surpassed 1 billion views on YouTube, marking their third music video to achieve this milestone.

sources.headline: The Black Eyed Peas’ ‘My Humps’ Bounces to 1 Billion Views on YouTube
sources.summary: It's their third music video to reach the milestone after “Where Is the Love?” and “RITMO.”

topics.title: Peacock Turns Its First-Ever Profit in Q2 as NBCUniversal Split Looms
topics.angle: NBCUniversal's streaming service Peacock reported its first profitable quarter in Q2, adding 2 million subscribers.

sources.headline: Peacock Adds 2M Subscribers In Q2, Turns First Profit; Studio A Standout As Comcast Plots Next Big Move
sources.summary: NBCUniversal streamer Peacock swung to a $189 million profit for the three months ended in June, its first quarter in the black, and added 2 million paid subscribers to reach 48 million.
